name: Proxy Execution via Program Compatibility Wizard
description: Detects the use of pcwrun.exe to proxy the execution of other commands, processes, or executables, a technique used by adversaries to evade defenses. Focus is on outlier events (e.g., unique counts) to reduce false positives.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Security Event ID for Process Creation (4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the child process that was spawned by pcwrun.exe.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the child process executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute the child process.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the child process was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.

parameters.name: parent_process_name
parameters.description: The name of the parent process, which should be 'pcwrun.exe'.

parameters.name: parent_process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the parent process (pcwrun.exe).
